recipe.title: TikTok Egg Boil

ingredients.name: eggs
ingredients.note: Use jammy eggs for the hero yolk reveal; hard-boiled is a source-supported fallback.

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.note: Melt gently on low heat; do not clarify or brown.

ingredients.name: garlic, minced
ingredients.note: Cook in butter until aromatic and pale.

ingredients.name: light brown sugar
ingredients.note: Balances heat and helps the sauce finish glossy.

ingredients.name: paprika
ingredients.note: Red color anchor for the boil sauce.

ingredients.name: red chili flakes
ingredients.note: Visible heat flecks; adjust to taste.

ingredients.name: chicken bone broth or vegetable broth, low sodium

steps.visualCue: clear bowl packed with ice cubes and cold water
steps.textureCue: hard ice facets, condensation, cold shock
steps.runwayRisk: ice can read as garnish if not paired with eggs

steps.text: Bring enough water to cover eggs to a rolling boil and carefully add eggs.
steps.visualCue: six white eggs lowered into bubbling water
steps.runwayRisk: induction must not become a gas flame

steps.text: Boil 7 minutes for runny yolks or 7 1/2 minutes for jammy yolks.
Move eggs to ice bath for 2 minutes.
steps.textureCue: cold splash, ice clink, wet shell shine
steps.runwayRisk: do not crack all eggs apart in the bath

steps.text: Peel under slow running water and dry.
steps.visualCue: shell ribbons slipping off glossy peeled eggs
steps.textureCue: silky whites, shell flakes, water droplets
steps.runwayRisk: hand-shell fusion if too many fragments are shown

steps.text: Melt butter on low, add garlic, cook 1 minute.
steps.textureCue: small butter bubbles, pale garlic, glossy fat
steps.runwayRisk: garlic should not brown or burn

steps.text: Add seasonings and stir for 1 minute.
steps.visualCue: red-orange spice rain blooming into garlic butter
steps.textureCue: dry spices darken into wet brick-red paste

steps.text: Add broth and simmer 6 minutes until slightly thickened.
steps.visualCue: broth deglazes spice paste into simmering red sauce
steps.textureCue: thin liquid turning glossy with chili oil beads
steps.runwayRisk: sauce must not become tomato marinara

steps.text: Add lemon juice, splash of water, and salt only if needed.
steps.visualCue: lemon droplets hit glossy red sauce
steps.textureCue: bright citrus beads, loose glossy nappage
steps.runwayRisk: avoid lemon seeds and watery sauce

steps.text: Place eggs in bowl, pour sauce over, garnish parsley, serve.
steps.visualCue: six peeled eggs swimming in red-gold garlic chili butter sauce
steps.textureCue: lacquered whites, jammy yolk, sticky spoon drag, herb confetti
steps.runwayRisk: lock six standard eggs, not quail eggs or giant eggs

assumptions: Use the 7 1/2 minute jammy egg option because the glossy yolk reveal is the strongest food-porn payoff.
Final serving focuses on the egg boil alone; rice, potatoes, and ciabatta are omitted to keep the hero bowl clean.
Show six standard chicken eggs; some final eggs may be halved after cooking to expose orange jammy yolks while preserving the source dish.
No recipe-specific generated intermediate references are planned because eggs in sauce are simple enough for text scale locks.
criticalTransformations: Eggs move from boil to ice bath so yolks stay jammy instead of gray and chalky.
Peeled eggs must look smooth, wet, and intact before saucing.
Garlic softens in butter without browning or burning.
Red-orange spices bloom in butter into a cohesive paste before broth is added.
Broth reduces into a glossy, slightly thick boil sauce with visible garlic and chili flakes.
Lemon juice loosens and brightens the reduced sauce without making it watery.
Boil sauce coats six peeled eggs and pools as a shiny red-gold bath.
Final yolk reveal shows molten orange jammy custard, not raw liquid or dry hard yolk.
visualTextureOpportunities: Brick-red sauce pours in a thick ribbon over white eggs and orange yolk.
A spoon drags through chili butter, exposing minced garlic and red flakes suspended in gloss.
Ice bath splash and shell crack create cold-hot contrast before sauce.
Paprika and Old Bay fall into butter as a saturated red-orange spice bloom.
Broth deglazes the spice paste into bubbling lacquer.
Lemon droplets flash on the sauce surface and release steam.
Parsley falls sparsely over red sauce for green contrast.
A halved egg is nudged so jammy yolk smears into spicy butter.
possibleHooks: Open on a macro spoon split through a jammy egg as glossy red boil sauce floods the yolk.
Open on the red garlic-butter sauce pouring over six peeled eggs like spicy lacquer.
Open on a chili-butter spoon drag with garlic bits and flakes before revealing the egg bowl.
Open on a quick shell peel snap that cuts directly to sauce-coated jammy yolk.
Open on parsley raining over a red-gold egg bowl, then cut back to boiling eggs.
promptPolicySources: creator instruction: make the recipe really sexy and food porn
creator instruction: avoid creating intermediate reference images unless indispensable
